creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
I am still incapacitated, however, would it inappropriate to have an updated 1.9.6 patch attached to this bug report, at least to allow others to participate in testing, and developing?

I have been fiending for a decent music player on FreeBSD for decades, I was never (first tried in 2019/2020) able to build deadbeef from the Ports (the joys and tribulations of running -CURRENT), tho, I still would like to try using it one day.
